description: Binary pass/fail criteria for cold outreach reply rate optimization

criteria.name: reply_rate_above_baseline
criteria.description: Variant reply rate must exceed current control reply rate

criteria.name: minimum_sample_size
criteria.description: At least 50 sends per variant before declaring winner

criteria.name: zero_banned_vocabulary
criteria.description: No AI-tell words in email copy

criteria.name: zero_em_dashes
criteria.description: No em dashes in email copy

criteria.name: unsubscribe_rate_stable
criteria.description: Unsubscribe rate must not increase vs previous period

criteria.name: subject_line_length
criteria.description: Subject line between 4-8 words for optimal open rate

criteria.name: single_cta
criteria.description: Email contains exactly one clear call-to-action

criteria.name: observation_window_met
criteria.description: Minimum 72 hours observation before declaring results
